pageDescription: Experience the power of Dentagia's AI-powered dental practice management software with our interactive demo

hero.title: See Dentagia in Action

features.title: Secure & Private

items.quote: The demo was incredibly intuitive. Within 10 minutes, I could see exactly how Dentagia would transform our practice operations and save us hours each week.

video.title: Watch a Quick Overview

items.question: How long does the demo last?
items.answer: Your personal demo environment remains active for 24 hours, giving you plenty of time to explore at your own pace and see how Dentagia fits your practice.

items.question: Is any installation required?
items.answer: No installation needed! Our demo runs entirely in your web browser. Simply click the link we send you and start exploring.

items.question: Will I have access to all features?
items.answer: Yes, you'll have access to all premium features during your demo period, including AI-powered scheduling, patient management, billing, and practice analytics.

items.question: Can I import my own practice data?
items.answer: The demo comes with sample dental practice data, but you can also upload your own data to see how the platform works with your real practice information.

items.question: What happens after the demo expires?
items.answer: All demo data is automatically deleted after 24 hours. If you'd like to continue, we can help you set up a trial account or schedule a personalized consultation.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
cta.description: Join hundreds of dental practices already using Dentagia to streamline operations and grow their practice.
